name: Ayanna Dennis
ai_summary: Ayanna is a nurturing caregiver with informal experience caring for children, including her two-year-old daughter. She is based in McDonough, GA, available full-time, and emphasizes creating a safe, positive environment where children can thrive under her watchful care.
